Esther Moerman Photography is a Vancouver-based wedding photographer known for capturing authentic, emotional moments with a natural and artistic style. Esther brings a warm and relaxed approach to every wedding, ensuring couples feel comfortable while she documents their special day with beautiful, heartfelt imagery.
